case_title: WONG, RAYMOND et al vs. MELARA, ELENIN VICENTE IND/DBA QUALITY AUTO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, RAYMOND WONG, LORRAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELARA, ELENIN VICENTE IND/DBA QUALITY AUTO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2144 FOLSOM STREET, S.F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, DETF. SHALL STAY AS OF 5/31/01.PLTF. MAY OBTAIN THE WRIT OF EXECUTION OR PESSESSION ON OR AFTER SAID DATE IN ORDER TO EVICT ALL DEFENDANTS, IF NECESSARY EACH PARTY BEAR HIS/HER OWN COSTS OF SUIT & ATTY'S FEES.
